(Renotice) Of Motion And Motion For Monetary, Issue, Evidence And Terminating Sanctions Against Deft Stefan O. Rittmann, Aka Steve Sheraton
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
ADAM M. KOSS, ESQ., (415)788-1900, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, K & S CO., INC.

DREXEL BRADSHAW, ESQ., (415)433-4800, FOR Defendant, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

Plaintiff's motion for monetary, issue, evidence and terminating sanctions against defendant Stefan O. Rittman aka Steve Sheraton granted in part, denied in part:
1. Request for terminating sanctions denied;
2. Request for issue and evidentiary sanctions granted: (i) defendant Stefan O. Rittman aka Steve Sheraton shall be precluded from offering any testimony in support of the denial of any allegation of plaintiff's complaint; and (ii) shall be precluded from offering any testimony in support of any affirmative defense set forth on his answer to plaintiff's complaint;
3. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $1,540.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order
ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
